raw_comment:
What do you notice?
The ratio of players of color in each sport is significantly larger than the percentage of coaches. NFL has the largest gap with 61% and MLS has the smallest with 19%. The MLS actually has the largest percentage of head coaches of color. 

What do you wonder?
I wonder if other leagues, especially the European leagues have similar numbers. 

What impact does this have on you and your community?
Young people can look up to the many athletes in the different sports. The athletes do not have many coaches to look up to, from similar background that understands them. Coaching is not diverse.

What’s going on in this graph? Write a catchy headline that captures the graph’s main idea.

You can became a professional player but not a head coach based on your skin color.
ace_sentences: The ratio of players of color in each sport is significantly larger than the percentage of coaches.
NFL has the largest gap with 61%.
MLS has the smallest gap with 19%.
MLS has the largest percentage of head coaches of color.
I wonder if other leagues have similar numbers.
I especially wonder if the European leagues have similar numbers.
You ask what impact this has on me and my community.
Young people can look up to the many athletes in the different sports.
The athletes do not have many coaches to look up to.
Some coaches are from a similar background.
A coach from a similar background understands the athletes.
You ask what is going on in this graph.
You ask to write a catchy headline that captures the graph’s main idea.
The headline is: You can became a professional player but not a head coach based on your skin color.
